_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Python Minecraft Plugin Generator
author: admin@pterodactyl.io
description: Gerador automatico de plugins Minecraft usando Python e IA
startup: if [ -f {{PYTHON_FILE}} ]; then python3 {{PYTHON_FILE}}; else echo 'Arquivo nao encontrado'; ls -la; tail -f /dev/null; fi

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt update
apt install -y openjdk-21-jdk maven wget unzip
wget -q https://services.gradle.org/distributions/gradle-8.5-bin.zip
unzip -q gradle-8.5-bin.zip
mv gradle-8.5 /opt/gradle
ln -s /opt/gradle/bin/gradle /usr/bin/gradle
rm gradle-8.5-bin.zip
export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64
cd /mnt/server
echo 'Instalacao concluida'
